WITH arr AS (SELECT [1, 2, 3]) SELECT arrayResize(arr, 4) FROM arr;
WITH arr AS (SELECT [1, 2, 3]) SELECT arrayResize(arr, 2) FROM arr;
CREATE TABLE test_array_extender (arr Array(Int32), extender Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
WITH arr AS (SELECT arrayResize([1, 2, 3], 6, 4)) SELECT arr, arrayResize(arr, 2) FROM arr;
SELECT arrayResize(arr, 2) AS short_arr, arrayResize(arr, 5, 0) AS extended_arr FROM test_array;
